fault_hypothesis: The overlap detection on line 62 incorrectly uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`). This causes adjacent time windows that touch at a boundary to be considered non-overlapping, when they should conflict.

spec.expr: ((candidate[1] <= slot[0] or candidate[0] >= slot[1])) == ((candidate[1] < slot[0] or candidate[0] > slot[1]))

constraints.intent: The buggy non-overlap logic should be equivalent to the correct logic using strict inequalities.
If the loop continues to the next iteration, the candidate must be strictly separate from the current slot.

spec.expr: all((candidate[1] < s[0] or candidate[0] > s[1]) for s in existing)

constraints.intent: If the candidate is accepted, it must not overlap with any of the pre-existing slots.
